executionArgs.additionalInstruction: The server is an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server running on port 3000. Authentication uses API keys configured via BARDO_API_KEYS_JSON env var. The .env file contains API keys. The MCP endpoint is at /mcp and expects JSON-RPC formatted requests. For MCP tool calls, you need to first create a session via POST /mcp with a proper JSON-RPC initialize request, then use the returned mcp-session-id header for subsequent requests. API key can be passed via x-api-key header.
